name_en: 🆕 【 M83676 Purple Red 】This Noa small wallet is crafted from Louis Vuitton's Monogram canvas, featuring a compact square design and a distinctive L-shaped zipper, with a colorful leather lining. It includes six card slots and a spacious fold-over pocket. 11 x 8.5 x 1.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C
